description: Extracts and summarizes document content for LLM understanding using protocolToMarkdown. Supports PDFs, Office documents, and other formats by converting them to markdown digests for analysis.

steps_hint: Extract document content from source file
Convert to markdown digest via protocolToMarkdown
Analyze and summarize the extracted content
use_cases: ドキュメント要約・理解
hints._comment: Pattern A: fully automatable. No browser interaction needed; media-actuator handles document extraction directly.
